action.reasoning: Observation: ConvNeXtTiny switch caused poor val_acc (~0.47-0.49) and bal_acc drop to 0.4975 (best remains 0.6537 from RN50 cRT iter24 with tau=1.7, few_shot~0.487). Current train.py truncated/incompatible, model.py on convnext (stem mismatch for 32x32). Analysis: RN50+cRT(Focal gamma2/s1 sqrt+mix/cut-rand-p0.5+RandAug+AdamW5e-4 cos60ep / CE/count+SGD0.05 nesterov s2 40ep on reinit-fc after freeze)+post tau-grid 0-3@0.05+weights_only=False is validated strong for CIFAR100-LT IR=100; convnext needs stem mods. Metrics logging and best-save/validate/grid logic worked in iter24. Decision: Revert model.py to timm resnet50 (CIFAR compatible, pretrained), provide full cleaned train.py (exact iter24 recipe + label_smoothing=0.1 in s2, explicit per-epoch+step logging for curves, proper reinit/freeze/named_params, RandAugment, batch=128, full CKPT with prior/best_tau), ensure predict.py robust. Train (expect ~0.65+), submit_eval immediately (fits ~6min iter, 1.27h/5 iters left, follows >20ep rule).
